steps.t: Your extended family can be found throughout the Vales of Anduin, but the Beorninghús will be a good place to begin.
Your family can be found throughout the Vales of Anduin. You should greet your family members with a <rgb=#00FF00>hug</rgb> whenever you f…
Beorn's cave can be found at the base of the Carrock in the Beorning-lands. You should enter Beorn's cave, a site for remembering members of your fami…
Beorn's cave can be found at the base of the Carrock in the Beorning-lands. Inside the cave, you should sit for a moment in quiet contemplation.
